claims.claim: Abdul Hussein controls the lead hand well and works off it when fighting in the southpaw stance.

claims.claim: Abdul Hussein is calculated, controls the lead hand well from the southpaw stance, and has strong calf kicks from the orthodox stance.

claims.claim: Ismael Bonfim quit against Nazim Sadykhov and Chris Padilla when facing adversity.
claims.quote: He quit against Nazim Satakov, you know, on a cut that was not even near his eye... He straight up quit against Chris Padilla.

claims.claim: Ismael Bonfim is a good striker.
claims.quote: I don't think Ismael Bonfim is awful at fighting. I think he's a good striker

claims.claim: Ismael Bonfim has good hands and boxing success when he is fresh.
claims.quote: while Ismile Bonfam is fresh that he can have some boxing success because when Bonfim is fresh, his hands for MMA are good.

claims.claim: Axel Sola showed great durability against Jones by not caring about his own safety.
claims.quote: Showed his durability, but you can only do so many of those in a career.

claims.claim: Axel Sola is much bigger and much tougher than Ismael Bonfim.
claims.quote: Axel Solo is going to be much much bigger, much tougher.

claims.claim: Ismael Bonfim tends to break when he is pressured or forced to fight on the back foot.
claims.quote: as soon as you answer to the bully, he constant he tends to break a little bit.

claims.claim: Axel Sola was rocked badly in his last fight.
claims.quote: He got rocked badly his last fight.

claims.claim: Axel Sola is coming off a loss.
claims.quote: Axel Sola is tested, he is coming off a loss

claims.claim: Axel Sola showed great cardio in his previous fight and never stopped moving.
claims.quote: He never stopped moving. The cardio looked great.

claims.claim: Axel Sola brings high pressure and mental toughness.
claims.quote: Axel Sola with the pressure. I know he has dog in him, so I don't have to worry about if things get tough, is he going to break?

claims.claim: Axel Sola's opponent has been finished by KO/TKO several times and didn't like the pressure in his last fight.
claims.quote: His opponent has been finished by KO/TKO several times. Didn't like the pressure from Chris Taku Pedie in his last fight. Is going to hate the pressure from Axel Sola.

claims.quote: Sam Patterson is 30. He's got a 78 inch reach. He's 14 and three. Come on, dude. 6'3.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has good cardio despite being a bigger fighter for his division.
claims.quote: He's also got pretty good cardio. You don't usually think of a guy that is kind of like bigger for the division to have good cardio.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson is coming off a poor performance against Michael Venom Paige.
claims.quote: Sam Patterson coming off of one of the worst fights in UFC history against Michael Venom Paige.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson is a massive betting favorite at around minus 425.
claims.quote: At about minus 425, Patterson will be the biggest favorite in this three-legg parlay.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has the ability to stay on the outside and outstrike Santiago Ponzinibio over a 15-minute fight.
claims.quote: I see a world where Patterson just you know stays on the outside and out strikes the guy for 15 minutes.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has sufficient boxing skills to hang with Santiago Ponzinibio.
claims.quote: I think that he's got the boxing to hang out to hang with with Ponzinibio.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has tall man defense where he keeps his chin up to be hit.
claims.quote: he does have that tall man defense. And if Sam Patterson loses this fight that's probably why. Because he does just kind of have his chin up there to be hit.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has a poor chin and gets hurt easily.
claims.quote: His chin isn't good.

claims.claim: Santiago can crack Sam Patterson and might hurt him.
claims.quote: I think Santiago could crack Sam in this fight. I wouldn't be surprised to see Santiago hurt Sam

claims.claim: Sam Patterson can get knocked out.
claims.quote: You don't see Sam Patterson's name in there, cuz that fool can get knocked out. We've seen it.

claims.claim: Santiago Ponzinibbio never quite came back the same after suffering a big injury a few years ago.
claims.quote: ever since Ponzi had that big injury like few years ago, more than a few years ago, quite a while ago, he never quite came back the same.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has a ton of power, demonstrated by first-round finishes over Danny Barlow and Trey Waters.
claims.quote: Sam Patterson who has a ton of power. I mean, look at what Patterson did to Danny Barlo. Look at what Patterson did to Trey Waters both in round one.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson possesses a ton of power in his hands and an elite submission game.
claims.quote: Patterson has a ton of power in his hands, and obviously an elite submission game as well.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson averages over 100 DraftKings points in wins.
claims.quote: Averaging over 100 DraftKings points in wins, that's pretty impressive.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson possesses a bit of defensive liability due to his tall man's defense.
claims.quote: Sam Patterson does have a bit of that tall man's defense

claims.claim: Sam Patterson made a great move by moving up to the welterweight division.
claims.quote: I think that Patterson made a great move going up to welterweight.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson will be more reckless in this fight due to the negative comments and hate he received after his last fight.
claims.quote: Sam's going to be more reckless than he is last fight, especially after all of the hate or bad comments he got after last fight.
